source.description: A six-panel raster contact sheet generated for the locked July 8 Sketcha.day slug, then cropped into step frames and the finished master.
source.notes: The sheet must keep the same lamp pose, desk edge, shade, base, pull chain, book, glow, and shadow from construction through finish.

process_strategy: The lamp is built from simple ellipses, a tilted shade, neck, base, book, and desk shadow before the final only darkens keeper lines and adds restrained warm shading.

final_elements.name: tilted lamp shade
final_elements.description: A slightly angled cone shade with an elliptical opening.

final_elements.name: lamp neck and stem
final_elements.description: A slim curved neck connecting the shade to the base.

final_elements.name: round lamp base
final_elements.description: A low oval base sitting on the desk.

final_elements.name: desk edge and shadow
final_elements.description: A simple tabletop line and soft cast shadow grounding the lamp.

final_elements.name: shade rim and base refinement
final_elements.description: Cleaner ellipses and connection lines on the already placed shade, neck, and base.

final_elements.name: small open book
final_elements.description: A small open book resting near the lamp base.

final_elements.name: pull chain and switch
final_elements.description: A short hanging chain under the shade with a tiny pull.

final_elements.name: warm shade tint
final_elements.description: Restrained yellow shading on the shade and glow area.

frames.visible_job: Places the shade ellipse, curved neck, stem, and oval base in a light construction pass.
Refines the outside shade and base contours, then adds the desk edge and first grounding shadow.
Clarifies the shade rim, underside, neck connection, and base ellipse.
Adds a small open book beside the base without changing the lamp pose.
Adds the pull chain, light warm shade tint, and stronger existing cast shadow.

final_step.visible_job: Only darkens the keeper contours, clarifies the existing shade, base, chain, book, tint, and desk shadow.
allowed_changes: small cleanup marks on existing features

rejection_checks: No major contour, prop, marking, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No frame may darken, ink, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
